nasb.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, “Consider and call for the mourning women, that they may come; And send for the wailing women, that they may come!

esv.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts: “Consider, and call for the mourning women to come; send for the skillful women to come;

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “你們要思想， 要把唱哀歌的婦女召來， 把那些擅長哀哭的婦女請來；

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华说： “把陪哭的妇人请来， 把最会哭的妇人带来，
